flashcards.definition: Functional unit of the kidney; filters blood and produces urine (~1 million per kidney).
Capillary tuft inside Bowman's capsule; site of blood filtration.
Outer region of the kidney containing glomeruli and convoluted tubules.
Inner region of the kidney containing loops of Henle and collecting ducts (pyramids).
Smooth muscle of the urinary bladder wall; contracts during urination.
